'''Tala 2''' was a [[Z-95t Headhunter]]<ref name="tala2" /> which was developed by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] tactician [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]].<ref name="db" /> As with all Z-95t Headhunters, Tala 2 had a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|class 3 hyperdrive]],<ref name="db stats" /> which individually allowed Tala 2 long-range [[Spy/Legends|reconnaissance]].<ref name="tala2" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought between the Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Tala 2 served in [[Tala Squadron]] and was [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Blount/Legends|Blount]]<ref name="blount" /> by [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Lieutenant Blount}} is set around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], the events of which are dated to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Blount worked for [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] and flew as the [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]] of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]],<ref name="blount" /> who flew the Z-95t Headhunter [[Tala 1]] and was operationally assigned to support [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] led by [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]],<ref name="CCG 3">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Tala 1}}</ref> an Alliance [[General/Legends|general]].<ref name="Return of the Jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref> Tala 2 was equipped with a sophisticated [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] suite to monitor Imperial activity during the Alliance commandos' operations.<ref name="tala2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tala 2 was created in [[2000]] by [[Decipher]] for their ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="tala2" />
